heading: Exportation of timber pulp wood and wood pulp from Alaska
label: 615b Exportation of timber pulp wood and wood pulp from Alaska
text: Birch timber and pulp wood or wood pulp manufactured from timber in Alaska may be exported therefrom.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 422 of Title 48
Amendments1920—Act , authorized exportation of birch timber.June 5, 1920
amendments: Amendments1920—Act , authorized exportation of birch timber.June 5, 1920
